---
title: "rng.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\games\odin_protocol\engine\rng.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.38
style_score: 4.10
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.92
---

## Intent
The `rng.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TacticalRNG, random, uniform, choice, randint, secure_choice. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TacticalRNG, random, uniform, choice, randint, secure_choice. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [random](file://random)
- [secrets](file://secrets)
- [collections.abc](file://collections.abc)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `TacticalRNG`
- `random`
- `uniform`
- `choice`
- `randint`
- `secure_choice`
